creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Welcome to the FreeBSD Community! Thanks for giving it a try... I will 
be closing this PR and pointing you to the freebsd-questions@ 
mailinglist, which is perfectly suited for your questions, people there 
are always willing to lend a hend to get things going. Reason for 
closing the PR is that it's not a Problem against the system, but a 
request for help, which is best done via questions@. Thank you for using 
FreeBSD!
